demo.title: promptpack.sh
demo.code:
# No key, no network — pure prompt composition
# List the curated recipes
node promptpack.mjs --list

# Compose a generator-ready prompt from a recipe + subject
node promptpack.mjs --recipe hero-concept --subject "a storm-forged knight" --out prompt.json

# Theme it with a brandkit token for a consistent look, then feed to mythosforge-imagegen
node promptpack.mjs --recipe hero-concept --subject "a storm-forged knight" --theme brandkit.json

setup: No API key, no network — pure prompt composition from a curated recipe library
Output { prompt, model, aspect, negative } feeds directly into a generator like mythosforge-imagegen. Optionally fold in a brandkit.json via --theme.
